ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has played professionally */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height in feet and inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* City and state where the team is located */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name for the position (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the season started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the season ended */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "super_bowl_date" TEXT /* Date of the Super Bowl */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistics are for */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games the player played in the season */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards the player had in the season */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards the player had in the season */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards the player had in the season */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receiving_targets" INTEGER /* Number of receiving targets */,
  "receiving_catches" INTEGER /* Number of receiving catches */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks (for quarterbacks) */,
  "sacks_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of sacks allowed (for offensive linemen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game was played in */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team for the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team for the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, Super Bowl) */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game in hours and minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistics are for */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards the player had in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards the player had in the game */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Total receiving yards the player had in the game */,
  "passing_completions" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions in the game */,
  "passing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts in the game */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns in the game */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown in the game */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts in the game */,
  "rushing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns in the game */,
  "receiving_targets" INTEGER /* Number of receiving targets in the game */,
  "receiving_catches" INTEGER /* Number of receiving catches in the game */,
  "receiving_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of receiving touchdowns in the game */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles in the game */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks in the game (for quarterbacks) */,
  "sacks_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of sacks allowed in the game (for offensive linemen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
